text: Created attachment 163388 svn diff for sysutils/mdf2iso CURRENT patch (svn diff) for sysutils/mdf2iso Updated as per comment 7 Obsoletes all previous. This patch adds PORTREVISION updates MASTER_SITES, MAINTAINER, USES (tar:xz), and distinfo This should be considered the final patch to UNBREAK sysutils/mdf2iso Thanks! --Chris
